title: Brute Force: Failed Logon Spike per Account
description: Detects 3+ failed logon attempts (4625) for a single account — indicates password spraying, brute force, or credential stuffing.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = '4625')) | stats count as Failures, distinctcount('Source Address') as UniqueSources by User, Entity | where Failures > 3 | sort -Failures
falsepositives: Users with expired or forgotten passwords
